title: Plan robust cumulant GMM audit
summary: Planned M56 as the robust cumulant GMM/generated-moment audit, routed it before M55 and M52, and updated planning/log/formal surfaces to flag that product-of-sample-moments cumulants may require primitive-moment weighting, augmented nuisance GMM, bootstrap calibration, or provisional evidence wording.

user_inputs.text: Plan a new task to evaluate whether robust fourth-cumulant moments with plug-in sample covariances, such as g1222_hat(B)=mean(z1 z2^3)-3 mean(z2^2) mean(z1 z2), can be treated with standard GMM/J-test theory, or whether the product-of-sample-moments structure requires augmented nuisance moments, delta-method weighting, code changes, or revised manuscript claims.

agent_actions.description: Created M56 packet, marked M55 as blocked by M56, updated task-board, dashboard, paper map, paper plan, source packet, workplan, formal registry, logs, and GitHub milestone metadata.
